LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 20 SO THAT THE COURT MAY RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JUNE 12 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION. STATING SOMETHING IN THE CONDITIONS OF ADMISSION FORM, EVEN IF IT IS SIGNED BY THE PATIENT, DOES NOT MAKE IT TRUE. DEFENDANT DID NOT PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE THAT THE TWO DOCTORS WERE NOT THE AGENTS OF DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Rebecca L. Byrne, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner Christopher Tam father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Katelyn Tam present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $4,250,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $704,928.07 payable to Mitchell Law Group.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $28,256.17
Medical Bill to the Department of Health Care Services Recovery Branch - MS 4720 P.O. Box 997421 Sacramento, CA 995899 in the total amount of $284,657.92
Total allowance for fees and expenses from settlement $1,017,842.16.
A net balance of $3,232,157.84, the balance shall be disbursed as follows: $1,000,000.00 to New York Life Insurance Company and $1,000,000.00 to Berkshire Hathaway for Periodic Payments.
$1,222,157.84 to the Trustee of the Katelyn Tam Special Needs Trust.
$10,000.00 to Mitchell Law Group for costs incurred but not yet invoiced. The balance of the cost reserve will be deposited into the Katelyn Tam Special Needs Trust.
If money is to be paid to a special needs trust under Probate Code Section 3604, all statutory liens in favor of the state Department of Health Care Services, the state Department of Mental Health, the state Department of Developmental Services, and any city and county in California must first be satisfied by Check to Department of Health Care Services in the amount of $284,657.92. Court signed Order approving compromise of Pending action Minor with a Disability. Petition for Order Establishing Special Needs Trust to be submitted to the Probate Department.
Court ordered a Status Conference: re: Special Needs Trust on January 29, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on (90 days from today) at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production. Stating something in the Conditions of Admission form, even if it is signed by the patient, does not make it true. Defendant did not present any evidence that the two doctors were not the agents of defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)
